title: MessageInfo
description: Summary information about a sent message.

ts.description: The Unix timestamp when the message was sent.

template.description: The template slug used, if any.

subject.description: The subject line of the message.

opens.description: The number of times the message was opened.

clicks.description: The number of link clicks in the message.

state.description: The current state of the message.

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the message.
